faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth problem in my Union home?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moth infestation include small holes in wool clothing, carpets, or upholstery, silken tubes or cases in closets, adult moths flying around wardrobes, and larvae or webbing on fabrics. If you notice any of these signs in your Union property, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth control cost in Union, NJ?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control services in Union typically range from $550 to $5,000 depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does clothes moth treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most clothes moth treatments show results within 24-48 hours, though complete elimination may take 2-4 weeks depending on the infestation level. We typically schedule follow-up visits to monitor progress and ensure all life stages of the moths are eliminated from your Union property.

faqs.question: Are your clothes moth treatments safe for my family and pets in Union?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment methods that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our certified technicians. We provide specific instructions for preparation and re-entry to ensure maximum safety for all Union residents.
